requirement_topic.en: Portugal E-Redes / REN Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 葡萄牙E-Redes / REN并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 葡萄牙E-Redes / REN併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Portugal should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to E-Redes (distribution network, formerly EDP Distribuição) technical review for low/medium voltage, and REN (Redes Energéticas Nacionais, transmission network) technical review for high-voltage utility-scale projects, with ERSE providing overarching energy-sector regulatory oversight. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Portugal's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Portugal uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Portugal is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Atlantic-coastal sites may require additional environmental derating for salt-air, high humidity, and high irradiance.
summary.zh: 葡萄牙并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，低/中压项目接受E-Redes（配电网，原EDP Distribuição）技术审查，高压大型项目接受REN（葡萄牙能源网络，输电网）技术审查，ERSE提供总体能源行业监管。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对葡萄牙230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。葡萄牙与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：葡萄牙为单相230 V、三相400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。大西洋沿岸场址可能需要额外考虑盐雾、高湿度和高辐照量的降额。
summary.zht: 葡萄牙併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，低/中壓項目接受E-Redes（配電網，原EDP Distribuição）技術審查，高壓大型項目接受REN（葡萄牙能源網絡，輸電網）技術審查，ERSE提供總體能源行業監管。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對葡萄牙230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。葡萄牙與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：葡萄牙為單相230 V、三相400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。大西洋沿岸場址可能需要額外考慮鹽霧、高濕度和高輻照量的降額。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
E-Redes — Manual de Ligações (distribution network connection technical manual) and project acceptance requirements
REN — Transmission network technical requirements for generating plants (RfG national implementation)
ERSE electricity-sector approval or oversight requirements where applicable
Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 — Requirements for Generators (RfG) as implemented in Portugal
Portugal low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Portugal's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to E-Redes acceptance or ERSE project review in Portugal.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非葡萄牙50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为E-Redes认可或ERSE项目审查证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非葡萄牙50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為E-Redes認可或ERSE項目審查證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Portugal E-Redes or REN project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Portugal-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Portugal voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For Atlantic coastal or high-humidity sites, include salt-mist, humidity, thermal derating, earthing, surge protection, and weak-grid ride-through assumptions in the project file. E-Redes typically requires Portuguese-language project documentation for distribution-level connection applications.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代葡萄牙E-Redes或REN项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、葡萄牙专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称葡萄牙电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。对于大西洋沿岸或高湿度场址，项目文件应包括盐雾、湿度、热降额、接地、浪涌保护和弱电网穿越假设。E-Redes通常要求配电级并网申请提供葡萄牙语项目文件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代葡萄牙E-Redes或REN項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、葡萄牙專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱葡萄牙電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。對於大西洋沿岸或高濕度場址，項目文件應包括鹽霧、濕度、熱降額、接地、浪湧保護和弱電網穿越假設。E-Redes通常要求配電級併網申請提供葡萄牙語項目文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through E-Redes technical review (distribution) and REN review (transmission), and any applicable ERSE project approval or oversight. EU RfG (2016/631) is directly applicable law in Portugal.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not an E-Redes or REN Portugal approval substitute

source.publisher: REN — Redes Energéticas Nacionais (Portugal transmission network operator)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Portugal E-Redes or REN grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Portugal's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and document Atlantic coastal environmental derating for relevant sites. Verify current E-Redes, REN, and ERSE project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning. Portuguese-language project documentation is commonly required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足葡萄牙E-Redes或REN并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为葡萄牙230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并记录相关场址的大西洋沿岸环境降额。出货或调试前请直接核实现行E-Redes、REN和ERSE项目要求。通常要求提供葡萄牙语项目文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足葡萄牙E-Redes或REN併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為葡萄牙230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並記錄相關場址的大西洋沿岸環境降額。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行E-Redes、REN和ERSE項目要求。通常要求提供葡萄牙語項目文件。
